---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a plugin, option, or capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What do you want to do**
The use case. If this is about Logstash parity, name the plugin/option and link
the Logstash docs for it.

**Proposed behavior**
What FerroStash should do. For a plugin/option, what inputs/outputs you expect.

**Alternatives**
Any workaround you currently use.

**Additional context**
Anything else (sample config, data shape, volume/throughput).
